changes.value:
All 6 unhandled errors during vitest run are the same root cause: `invokeFocusChange is not defined` at `handleWindowFocus` in `src/lib/entity-focus-context.tsx:182`. This surfaces in 6 test files:
- autosave-focus.browser.test.tsx
- editor-save.test.tsx
- entity-inspector.test.tsx
- entity-card.test.tsx
- command-palette.test.tsx
- app-shell.test.tsx

The variable `invokeFocusChange` is referenced but not in scope at line 182. #test-failure
Fix: ReferenceError invokeFocusChange is not defined in entity-focus-context.tsx:182
